title: Kaths Resourcepack
description: This a resourcepack for some of my datapacks. Without, all new items will have not the correct texture.
body: # What Resourcepack is this? This is a R-Pack use alongsite all my datapack projects. I put all textures in one pack for every datapack. |Used in:| |-| | | # Which Datapacks are using this R-Pack? - Kaths Skillsystem : https://modrinth.com/datapack/kaths-skillsystem - Kaths Simple Bossmobs : https://modrinth.com/datapack/kaths-simple-bossmobs - Kaths Teleporter : https://modrinth.com/datapack/kaths-teleporter ### More in planning. # What if I don't use this R-Pack with your Datapacks? All new items will rather be a carrot-on-a-stick or some other random item. Also this *maybe could* get problems with other Datapacks like mine with are implementing new items and using R-Packs to change textures, but I try to give all new items a CustomModelData that should not interrupt with other datapacks. # Why do I have a ring symbol in my Inventory? Because I use one R-Pack for all my datapacks, even on still private datapack, there will be textures in the R-Pack that does nothing. In terms of the ring symbol, it's just a texture, you can still normally use the slot, it's for a datapack which implements accessories, but still private and work in progress for public use.
